# QKS Group’s SPARK Matrix™: eCommerce Fraud Prevention Solutions

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

### Recognized for technology excellence, customer impact, and innovation that protects digital commerce worldwide

In the latest _SPARK Matrix™_: eCommerce Fraud Prevention Solutions, Q4 2025 by QKS Group, Sift has been named a Leader, distinguishing itself for its advanced AI-driven fraud prevention, global intelligence network, and strong customer focus.

The report highlights how **The Sift Platform** consolidates customer, transaction, device, and behavioral data into a unified system that delivers real-time, cross-industry fraud intelligence. With capabilities like **ThreatClusters, RiskWatch,** and **Global Identity**, Sift empowers enterprises to detect first-time fraudsters across industries while maintaining a frictionless customer experience.

![](https://sift.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Landing_Page_Inline_QKS-REPORT.png)

### Download this report to gain strategic insights about:

*   Key trends shaping modern eCommerce fraud prevention
*   Capabilities defining next-generation fraud platforms
*   Market evaluation of leading vendors
*   Best practices for strengthening fraud operations

#### About the SPARK Matrix™

QKS Group’s SPARK Matrix™ evaluates global vendors on **Technology Excellence** and Customer Impact to identify the industry’s most innovative and trusted partners. Leaders in the Matrix “set the gold standard” for scalability, innovation, and customer-centric design—helping organizations stay ahead of emerging fraud patterns and regulatory demands.

Flip the switch on fraud-fueled fear. Make risk work for your business and scale securely into new markets with Sift’s AI-powered platform.
